name: Deep Agents with LangGraph
skills: Long-horizon agents — planning, sub-agent delegation, persistent memory and file tools.

name: Ambient Agents with LangGraph
skills: Event-driven, always-on agents with human-in-the-loop (e.g. an autonomous email assistant).

name: Agent Observability & Evaluations
skills: Tracing, eval suites and LLM-as-judge to measure and debug agent quality with LangSmith.

name: Introduction to LangGraph
skills: Graph-based agent orchestration — state, nodes, edges, cycles and persistence.

name: AI Agents Course
skills: Agent fundamentals — tools, function-calling, the ReAct loop, smolagents and LlamaIndex.

name: Intro to Deep Learning
skills: Neural nets end to end — layers, activations, SGD and handling overfitting in Keras.

name: Data Science Academy
skills: Citi's internal data-science program — ML, statistics and analytics applied to banking.

name: Business Analytics (NSDC)
skills: Business-analytics foundations — statistics, visualization and data-driven decisions.

name: Complete Python Bootcamp
skills: End-to-end Python — data structures, OOP, modules and practical scripting.
